title: Cobble Lemon
description: Custom modpack for CobbleLemon SMP. We are a Cobblemon based server which has 0 P2W Micro Transactions and focuses on a survival feel. Minimal command usages, and rewarding content! Come Check out our consistent events that happen multiple times a week!
body:
CobbleLemon is a Cobblemon-focused survival multiplayer modpack built for the CobbleLemon server. It keeps the core Minecraft survival loop important while expanding Cobblemon progression with custom server systems, progression tools, and endgame activities.

The pack is designed around a survival+ Cobblemon experience. Players are encouraged to build bases, farm resources, explore, train Pokemon, participate in player-run gyms, use player shops, and progress through custom Cobblemon systems without relying on heavy commands or microtransactions.

Features

- Cobblemon-focused SMP gameplay
- Vanilla-style survival progression
- Custom guide GUI for server mechanics
- ZA Royale ranked battle system
- Player-run gym system
- Player shops and economy support
- Additional Cobblemon progression and endgame systems
- Breeding controls for players who sell or trade Pokemon
- Server-side systems designed for the CobbleLemon community

Multiplayer Server

This modpack is intended for use on the CobbleLemon server

Some features are designed specifically for the server and may not function the same way in singleplayer or on other servers.
